query: how to create internal links between notes
notes: core Obsidian feature; 'Internal links' is the canonical term

query: frontmatter properties in notes
notes: YAML frontmatter / note metadata; called 'Properties' in Obsidian

query: how to use tags to organize notes
notes: tagging system; Tags view is a UI companion

query: keyboard shortcuts and hotkeys
notes: Hotkeys is the settings panel; editing shortcuts covers editor-level bindings

query: canvas infinite whiteboard plugin
notes: Canvas is a core plugin for freeform note layouts

query: note templates reuse structure
notes: Templates plugin; Daily notes uses templates as well

query: search inside vault
notes: Search plugin for full-text search; Quick switcher is file-search

query: callout boxes and admonitions
notes: Obsidian's callout syntax (> [!info])

query: backlinks to a note
notes: Backlinks plugin shows incoming links to current note

query: daily notes journaling plugin
notes: Daily notes creates dated notes automatically

query: connect notes and see how they relate
notes: conceptual phrasing for the graph; may also surface internal links

query: insert pre-defined snippets of text into notes
notes: uses vocabulary from the file itself ('pre-defined snippets'); previous query 'reuse a consistent structure' had zero vocab overlap with Templates.md and was unmeasurable

query: visualize knowledge graph of notes
notes: knowledge graph is a synonym; backlinks is related

query: add keywords or topics to notes for filtering
notes: Tags.md opens with 'Tags are keywords or topics'; previous query 'labels or categories' had zero overlap — neither word appears in the file

query: switch between reading and editing mode
relevant_paths: Editing and formatting/Views and editing mode.md
notes: Live preview vs reading view vs source mode; Basic formatting syntax.md is not relevant here

query: как работает граф связей между заметками
notes: Russian: 'how does the connection graph between notes work'

query: теги для организации заметок в хранилище
notes: Russian: 'tags for organizing notes in the vault'

query: математические формулы в заметках
notes: Russian: 'mathematical formulas in notes' → MathJax section in Advanced formatting

query: callout syntax warning info tip block
notes: tests Obsidian-specific callout type names; Advanced formatting syntax.md does not cover callouts

query: block reference embed section of another note
notes: block references (^id syntax) live in Internal links; embed files covers ![[]] embeds
